title: Guangzhou, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Guangzhou, Guangdong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Guangzhou is a city in Guangdong with a population of 18,676,000. A major port city and manufacturing powerhouse in southern China, famous for its Cantonese cuisine, historic temples, and vibrant trade fairs.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
